SEARCH
Package gov.cdc.izgateway.dynamodb.repository

Class EventRepository

java.lang.Object
gov.cdc.izgateway.repository.DynamoDbRepository<Event>
gov.cdc.izgateway.dynamodb.repository.EventRepository
All Implemented Interfaces:
gov.cdc.izgateway.repository.IRepository<Event>
public class EventRepository extends gov.cdc.izgateway.repository.DynamoDbRepository<Event>
Class representing the DynamoDb repository for Events. Event track important activity in the system that may need to be shared between services. Events create a "lock" on an activity while it is being processed to prevent duplicate processing. The event has a type and a target. The type is the name of the event, and the target is the specific instance of that event.
Author:
Audacious Inquiry
